title: Is it possible to create a authentication page like this monday app integration?
excerpt:
Hi all, 
Currently we are creating a integration between a Monday and other platform. I just wanted to know is it possible to develop a authentication screen like twilio app did for our integration. 
Thanks

posts.author: flowdemo (flow demo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Currently we are creating a integration between a Monday and other platform. I just wanted to know is it possible to develop a authentication screen like twilio app did for our integration.

Thanks

Screenshot from 2023-08-16 12-23-591879×928 63.5 KB

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: When a user clicks on your app’s integration or uses it in an automation, they go through an Authentication process. During this process, you can direct users to a page (which you will have to build yourself) like the one shown in your screenshot and then redirect them back to monday after the authorization process is completed.

posts.author: flowdemo (flow demo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Yes. But when I tried this it redirect user to another page instead of opening the modal top of the monday.com. I want to know how to open the modal inside the monday.com instead of redirect user to another page?

Thanks

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, at the moment, that is not possible. The page you are seeing was specifically created by monday.com for their products. It is not available to be used by external parties.
